extract: Fezandipiti (Japanese: キチキギス Kichikigisu) is a dual-type Poison/Fairy Legendary Pokémon introduced during Generation IX, in The Teal Mask. It is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon. It is a member of Pecharunt's Loyal Three, along with Okidogi and Munkidori, and is associated with Ogerpon.
